ROOM #509 COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN. D. CARTER, CLERK. DONNA COSTELLO, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: FRANK MYERS, PLTF. ARONLD W. EVJE II, ATTY. FOR PLTF. GEORGE MOSLEY, DEFT. STEPHEN L COLLIER, ATTY. FOR DEFT. 3:30 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE DID NOT SETTLE, HOWEVER DEFENDANT IS LIKELY TO VACATE BY 10/6/97. IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY THE ABOVE DATE, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE ON THE JURY TRIAL DATE OF 10/7/97. IT IS DETERMINED THAT THIS CASE IS TO REMAIN ON THE JURY TRIAL CALENDAR FOR 10/7/97 UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE FROM PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY.
